_note: Curated from pylint-odoo v3.x for Odoo v11. v11 dropped old API entirely (no more cr/uid), Python 3 only, new JS module system. @api.multi still present (removed v14). ESLint from odoo/addons/web/static/src/.eslintrc.

rules.message: Manifest file is missing required key `name`.
rules.fix_template: Add `'name': 'My Module'` to the __manifest__.py dict.

rules.message: Manifest file is missing required key `version`.
rules.fix_template: Add `'version': '11.0.1.0.0'` following OCA version convention.

rules.message: Manifest file is missing recommended key `author`.
Manifest file is missing recommended key `license`.
rules.fix_template: Add `'license': 'LGPL-3'` or `'AGPL-3'`.

rules.message: Manifest file `installable` key should be a boolean.
`@api.multi` is deprecated and will be removed in v13 — prefer explicit `for rec in self:` pattern.
`_columns` dict used — not supported in v11 (Python 3 only, new API mandatory).
rules.fix_template: Replace with `fields.*` class attributes.

rules.message: `_constraints` list used — not supported in v11; use `@api.constrains`.
rules.fix_template: Use `@api.constrains('field1', 'field2')` on the validation method.

rules.message: Old API method signature `(cr, uid, ids, context)` — not supported in v11.
rules.fix_template: Switch to new API: `def my_method(self, ...):`.

rules.message: Use of `osv.osv` or `osv.Model` base class — use `models.Model` in v11+.
rules.fix_template: Replace `class MyModel(osv.osv):` with `class MyModel(models.Model):`.

rules.message: New model class is missing `_name` attribute.
rules.fix_template: Add `_name = 'module.model'` as the first class attribute.

rules.message: `_inherit` without `_name` creates extension — ensure this is intentional.
ir.model.access entry missing from security CSV — model may be inaccessible.
rules.fix_template: Ensure `security/ir.model.access.csv` lists all models defined in the module.

rules.message: XML id reference does not match any declared id in the module or its dependencies.
Translation string uses positional `%s` formatting — use named `%(name)s`.
Translatable string concatenation — do not split translatable strings across `+` operators.
rules.fix_template: Use a single `_('Full sentence %(var)s')` instead of concatenating translated fragments.

rules.message: File declared in manifest `data` list does not exist.
Demo data file declared in manifest `demo` list does not exist.
SQL injection risk: `cr.execute` called with string interpolation instead of parameterized query.
rules.fix_template: Use parameterized query: `cr.execute('SELECT ... WHERE id = %s', (record_id,))`.

rules.message: Built-in dynamic expression interpreter used with external input — use `odoo.tools.safe_eval` instead.
rules.fix_template: Import safe_eval from odoo.tools.safe_eval and use it to sandbox expression execution.

rules.message: `sudo()` called without restricting scope — avoid broad `sudo()` for entire CRUD operations.
rules.fix_template: Prefer `self.sudo(user)` or narrow the sudo() call to the minimum required action.

rules.message: Hardcoded database ID used in code — use `env.ref()` instead.
rules.fix_template: Replace hardcoded integer id with `self.env.ref('module.xml_id').id`.

rules.message: Hardcoded company or currency ID — use `self.env.company` or `self.env.user.company_id`.
rules.fix_template: Use `self.env.company.id` rather than a literal integer.

rules.message: `_rec_name` field not present in model fields.
`copy()` override does not call `super()`.
rules.fix_template: Ensure `res = super().copy(default)` is called first.

rules.message: `write()` override does not call `super()` — record changes may not be persisted.
rules.fix_template: Ensure `res = super().write(vals)` is called and returned.

rules.message: `create()` override does not call `super()` — record will not be created.
rules.fix_template: Ensure `record = super().create(vals)` then `return record`.

rules.message: `unlink()` override does not call `super()` — records will not be deleted from DB.
rules.fix_template: Ensure `res = super().unlink()` is called and returned.

rules.message: N+1 ORM query in loop: `browse()` or `search()` called inside a `for` loop over records.
rules.fix_template: Use mapped(), filtered(), or prefetch by reading a relational field on the recordset before the loop.

rules.message: Computed field missing `@api.depends` decorator — will never be recomputed automatically.
rules.fix_template: Add `@api.depends('field1', 'field2')` above the compute method.

rules.message: `search()` method override must return a recordset and call `super()`.
rules.fix_template: Ensure `search()` override returns `super().search(args, ...)` after modifying the domain.

rules.message: Many2one field missing `ondelete` parameter — defaults to 'set null' which may leave orphan references.
rules.fix_template: Add `ondelete='restrict'` or `ondelete='cascade'` to the Many2one field definition.

rules.message: `digits=(16, 2)` tuple format deprecated — use a precision field name string.
rules.fix_template: Replace `digits=(16, 2)` with `digits='Account'` referencing a `decimal.precision` record.

rules.message: `copy=True` set on a field with a unique SQL constraint — duplication will fail.
rules.fix_template: Set `copy=False` on fields covered by a `UNIQUE` constraint in `_sql_constraints`.

rules.message: `default_get()` override does not call `super()` — default values from other modules will be lost.
rules.fix_template: Call `result = super().default_get(fields_list)` first, then update and return `result`.

rules.message: `_sql_constraints` entry message is not wrapped in `_()` for translation.
rules.fix_template: Use `_sql_constraints = [('name', 'UNIQUE(field)', _('Error message'))]`.

rules.message: `fields.Html` field without `sanitize=True` may allow XSS — verify sanitization is intentional.
rules.fix_template: Explicitly set `sanitize=True` (default) or document why sanitization is disabled.

rules.message: `_order` attribute references a field that does not exist in the model.
rules.fix_template: Check `_order = 'field_name'` matches an actual field on the model.

rules.message: QWeb report template missing `t-name` attribute.
rules.fix_template: Add `t-name='module.report_template_id'` to the `<template>` tag.

rules.message: XPath `position='replace'` removes the target element entirely — verify this is intentional.
View inheritance without `inherit_id` — `<record model='ir.ui.view'>` missing `inherit_id` field.
rules.fix_template: Add `<field name='inherit_id' ref='module.view_id'/>` to the view record.

rules.message: `_sql_constraints` entry uses invalid constraint type or malformed tuple.
rules.fix_template: Valid form: `('constraint_name', 'UNIQUE(field)', 'Error message')`.

rules.message: Unexpected `var`. Use `let` or `const` instead.
Unexpected `console` statement in production JS.
Reference to undeclared variable.
Variable declared but never used.
rules.fix_template: Remove the unused variable declaration or use it.

rules.message: Direct `require()` of Odoo service — use `useService()` hook in OWL components.
Use of restricted global — prefer Odoo module-scoped equivalents.
Blind exception: do not catch `Exception` without re-raising or logging — catches too broadly.
Line too long (exceeds max line length).
Import block is unsorted or has wrong grouping.
rules.fix_template: Run `ruff check --fix` to auto-sort imports.

rules.message: Module imported but unused.
rules.fix_template: Remove the unused import or add `# noqa: F401` if re-exported intentionally.
